CustomField.description: Controls what happens when provider-native prompt safety checks cannot complete. Fail Open allows the prompt through on moderation API errors. Fail Closed blocks the prompt until moderation succeeds.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fail Open: allow the prompt when moderation is unavailable. Fail Closed: block the prompt when moderation is unavailable or returns an invalid response.
CustomField.label: Prompt Safety Failure Mode
